verifiedClaims.claim: ioredis supports reliable failover and cluster mode.

unverifiedClaims.claim: Hit rate > 70% is achievable for this dashboard workload.
unverifiedClaims.notes: Depends on user frequency and data volatility. Needs load testing.

implementationPatterns.name: Cache-aside (Lazy Loading)
implementationPatterns.description: Application checks cache first, then DB, then populates cache.

implementationPatterns.name: Passive Invalidation
implementationPatterns.description: Use TTL for most records to ensure eventual consistency.
